strengths: Extensive experience in event-driven architectures and distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq)
Strong background in fintech-adjacent domains (pricing optimization at Optilyz, investment practices at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people or leading 30+ person organizations
No explicit mention of regulated environments or high-stakes commercial AI systems
Lacks demonstrated experience with real-time credit risk, liquidity optimization, or multi-jurisdictional compliance
response.justification: Bogdan has relevant technical skills in event-driven systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks critical fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit risk, liquidity management) and evidence of scaling engineering teams to the required size. His recent AI-agent work at re:cinq is promising but insufficient to fully meet the role's demands without additional domain-specific context.
